## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce
```bash
# Paste the exact command you ran
dconv to-pdf ...
```

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Paste the full error output:
```
<error here>
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.4 / Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.2 |
| dconv version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| LibreOffice version | e.g. 24.2.1 |

## Additional Context
Any other info, screenshots, or sample files that might help.
